title: Token Minting
description: Create token service that mints JWTs with claims: iss, sub (agent_id), aud, exp, iat, jti, scopes, agent_type, trust_level, parent_agent_id, delegation_chain. Sign with current active RSA key. Support configurable expiry. Return token + metadata.
validation: Mints JWTs with all required claims (iss, sub, aud, exp, iat, jti)
Includes custom claims: scopes, agent_type, trust_level, parent_agent_id, delegation_chain
Signs with current active RSA key
Tests verify JWT structure and claims
Tests verify signature with public key
